mapper.insert: INSERT INTO test (title, course_id, total_score, duration, start_time, end_time, status, create_time) VALUES (#{title}, #{courseId}, #{totalScore}, #{duration}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{status}, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE test SET title = #{title}, course_id = #{courseId}, total_score = #{totalScore}, duration = #{duration}, start_time = #{startTime}, end_time = #{endTime}, status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM test WHERE course_id = #{courseId} ORDER BY create_time DESC

SELECT t.*, c.course_name AS courseName FROM test t LEFT JOIN course c ON t.course_id = c.id WHERE t.course_id IN ( SELECT sc.course_id FROM student_course sc WHERE sc.student_id = #{studentId} ) ORDER BY t.start_time DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM student_course WHERE course_id = #{courseId}
